task_completion.description: Navigate to the Search Synonyms page in the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Search Synonyms' page title is visible in the Magento admin panel interface.

task_completion.description: Create the first synonym group: 'laptop, notebook, ultrabook'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'laptop, notebook, ultrabook' are visible in the Search Synonyms grid or within the 'New Synonym Group' form. The scope or Store View should be set to 'All Store Views'.

task_completion.description: Create the second synonym group: 'phone, smartphone, mobile, cellphone'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'phone, smartphone, mobile, cellphone' are visible in the Search Synonyms grid or within the 'New Synonym Group' form. The scope or Store View should be set to 'All Store Views'.

task_completion.description: Create the third synonym group: 'headphones, earphones, earbuds, headset'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'headphones, earphones, earbuds, headset' are visible in the Search Synonyms grid or within the 'New Synonym Group' form. The scope or Store View should be set to 'All Store Views'.

task_completion.description: Create the fourth synonym group: 'tshirt, tee, t-shirt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'tshirt, tee, t-shirt' are visible in the Search Synonyms grid or within the 'New Synonym Group' form. The scope or Store View should be set to 'All Store Views'.

task_completion.description: Create the fifth synonym group: 'jacket, coat, outerwear, parka'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'jacket, coat, outerwear, parka' are visible in the Search Synonyms grid or within the 'New Synonym Group' form. The scope or Store View should be set to 'All Store Views'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Magento admin panel GUI to create the synonyms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Magento admin web interface is visible in the screenshots, rather than a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal or database tool to insert the synonyms directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or MySQL CLI) are used to run SQL INSERT commands.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the synonyms into the Magento system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The synonyms are entered into the Magento 'New Synonym Group' form or displayed in the Magento Search Synonyms grid, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected synonym groups are: 1. 'laptop, notebook, ultrabook', 2. 'phone, smartphone, mobile, cellphone', 3. 'headphones, earphones, earbuds, headset', 4. 'tshirt, tee, t-shirt', 5. 'jacket, coat, outerwear, parka'. The scope for all groups must be 'All Store Views'.
